verify.subject: Confirm your email address to start using nvelope
verify.preview: Confirm your email address to start using nvelope
verify.heading: Confirm your email
verify.greeting: Hi {{name}}, thanks for creating your nvelope account.
verify.instruction: To start building and sending newsletters, please confirm this email address.
verify.linkHint: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verify.about: nvelope is a managed platform for building, sending, and tracking newsletters and email campaigns.
verify.ignore: If you didn't create an nvelope account, you can safely ignore this email — no account will be activated without confirmation.
